title: Assign board owners automatically when a new board is created using template with the help of an automation
excerpt:
I am trying to assign the members automatically as board owners of the newly created boards using saved templates with the help of an automation. 
You can see the automation I am trying to use in the attached file.

posts.author: nclark (Nichole Clark)
posts.cookedHtml: We are having the same issue. I noticed it actually says Monday should automatically assign you as an owner to the new board created from the template but it doesn’t assign any owner. I think its a development glitch.
